title: Author Registry
description: Registry of authors and corporate bodies that appear as metadata envelope authors across OCD data files.

author_id.description: Kebab-case canonical identifier. Must be unique across all entries.

aliases.description: Alternative name forms found in data files or likely to appear in future sources (abbreviations, alternate spellings, honorifics).

birth_year.description: Year of birth (or founding for corporate bodies). Null if unknown.

death_year.description: Year of death (or dissolution for corporate bodies). Null if unknown.

tradition.description: Theological tradition(s). Same enum as envelope tradition field.

nationality.description: Country or region of origin. Null for ancient figures or corporate bodies.

works.description: Resource IDs (meta.id values) of works by this author present in the dataset. Empty array if not yet in dataset (forward-compat entry).

notes.description: Free-text notes for disambiguation, co-authorship relationships, or historical context.
